title: Array Technologies Inc Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights
text: Revenue nearly $1.3 billion in 2025, 40% year-over-year increase, with tracker volume growth of 35% in 2025. Company achieved record $2.2 billion order book at end of 2025. On profitability: Adjusted gross margin 27% for full year 2025. Adjusted EBITDA reached $188 million with 15% margin. Adjusted net income $103 million, 13% increase from 2024. Adjusted diluted net income per share $0.67, 12% increase from 2024. 2026 guidance: Revenue expected in range of $1.4 to $1.5 billion for 2026. Adjusted gross margin guidance between 26% and 27%. Adjusted EBITDA guidance $200 to $230 million. Adjusted diluted earnings per share guidance $0.65 to $0.75. For 2026, Array expects about 40% of revenue in first half and 60% in back half, with Q1 revenue around $200 million.
